allow: Bash(python -m pip install "passlib[bcrypt]" itsdangerous authlib httpx)
Bash(python -c "from passlib.context import CryptContext; ctx=CryptContext\(schemes=['bcrypt']\); h=ctx.hash\('hello'\); print\('bcrypt ok:', ctx.verify\('hello', h\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import bcrypt; h=bcrypt.hashpw\(b'hello', bcrypt.gensalt\(\)\); print\('bcrypt direct ok:', bcrypt.checkpw\(b'hello', h\)\)")
